blocks.content: In the fire, Rian thought.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Damn it.
Purifying Ymir's Demon was on a different level from any emotion he had felt before.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Is this Ymir?
It was an endless dissatisfaction.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: As if he hadn't been able to breathe for over a hundred million years, as if he hadn't been able to excrete for over a billion years.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: No living creature can endure this.
But what would Ymir think in that cosmic contradiction, born to endure?

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: Ahhh! I will eat it! I will eat it all!
The more he did, the larger Gehenna's flames grew, and the land turned into lava, surging like the sea.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: The pinnacle of emotion.
The reason Shirone couldn't act was the same reason Lete was watching.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: They are pushing each other beyond their limits. Not providing variables is actually helping.
As Gehenna's chain transcended the limits of purification, Rian's body began to melt.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Ugh!
Seeing the burning flesh fall off, Monoras's eyes filled with blood.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: I, I…
The land of lava shook as large as a mountain.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: I will eat it!
With a pop, Rian's body evaporated, and a cold smile appeared on Lete's lips.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: No one can stop Ymir's Demon. It's the same in reality…
She looked back at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: It's unfortunate. Your and the Grand Duke's efforts have been in vain. Just give up.
Annihilation in the underworld literally meant the nothingness of existence.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: It can't be helped.
As Lete's eyes narrowed, Shirone spoke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: …That's what you feel. When it happens, when such a result comes out.
The lava rippled unnaturally, and the entire land began to swell as if it were rising.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Rian is different. If he wants to do it, he will definitely do it. If Ymir's power comes from contradiction, Rian's belief is also a contradiction.
Rian's sword was a sword that denied everything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And denying everything means transcending the world.
It could be said like this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Divine Transcendence.
As the slowly swelling lava suddenly shot up to the sky, Lete turned her head.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Shock was evident in her eyes.
That is…
It was Rian, so huge that he could probably be seen beyond the horizon of hell.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Ahhh!
The lava in the form of a Yaksha had no vocal cords, but the vacuum of the cavity alone was enough to shake the world.
At that moment, Lete realized.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Monoras! Run away!
But it was already too late; Monoras was in agony, showing the whites of his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Monoras
blocks.content: I will eat it! I will… I will…
With a flash, the world was engulfed in light, and all the matter within sight evaporated.
Lete, who had been covering her face and twisting her body, opened her eyes as the heat disappeared.
An endless, massive pit had formed, black as the universe.

blocks.speaker: Lete
blocks.content: Everything is purified.
The land, Laviette, and the many cities around it had become nothingness.
Shirone entered the pit.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian!
As he descended tens of kilometers, he heard a sound like tens of thousands of people screaming simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Resonance of darkness. This is bad.
Rian had created an abyss by purifying the entire land.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The sense of time is fading.
Time doesn't flow in the abyss.
It's the same principle as time disappearing when all matter in the universe is removed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian!
Feeling all eleven senses paralyzing, Shirone exploded the light of Agape.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If he went deeper, he wouldn't even be able to sense his own existence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Where is it? Where are you?
The sharp light like a blade shattered the darkness but caught nothing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn it!
It was no longer space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hey, hey. Are you okay?
In the darkness of the abyss, Son Yu-jung groped Rian's seemingly dead body.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Let's get out of here quickly. This place is strange. If we stay here, we'll go crazy.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: The abyss.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: A powerful nature that swallowed countless monsters.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Son Yu-jung.
Hurriedly coming to her senses, Son Yu-jung refocused on the hand touching Rian.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: I can't let my guard down. If my attention wavers even a little, I'll lose my senses.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Honestly, she doubted whether what she was touching was real.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Ah, it's warm. Son Yu-jung. The sea is so beautiful. My mother, she drowned…

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Shut up. Don't make a racket.
Son Yu-jung shook Rian.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Hey, hey! Get a grip!

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Hehehe! You idiot, why did you jump in to save this guy? You should have run away.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Do you think I saved him because I wanted to?

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: If she could act just once while injured, she had to grab Rian.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: In the abyss, you lose yourself. He's the only one who can escape this place.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Idea was the only standard.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Hey! Get up! Get up!
Desperate, she tried anything, but it was probably difficult to regain consciousness.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: I've never heard of humans creating something like this. What's this guy's limit?

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Now she had to gamble.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: My hair. My hair.
Using her last bit of concentration, she pulled out her hair and caused a string phenomenon.
Huuu…
A faint light seemed to illuminate the surroundings, but the darkness soon swallowed her hair.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Scream.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: No! Get a grip!
But it was only happening in her mind; no actual voice came out.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Ah! Ah!
No matter how much she screamed, her senses didn't return, and eventually, her consciousness was swallowed by darkness.
The moment even her ego disappeared, a drop of light from the string fell below.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Huh?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What is this?
Feeling the refreshing energy cleanse his mind, Rian slowly opened his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I couldn't see anything, and he quickly realized it was different from the darkness humans usually imagine.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I can't feel anything.
As he reached forward, Gehenna's chain was sucked in, and he grabbed.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone.
Rian, who had been deep in thought, slightly lifted the corners of his mouth.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Stronger.
The Ymir's Demon he had absorbed was filling his entire body with power as if it would burst.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Idea.
The great sword pierced the darkness.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Divine Transcendence.
A single coordinate that Rian had established redefined the void of the abyss into space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian!
As the light of Agape surged in, it brightly illuminated Rian's surroundings.
As Shirone smiled, making eye contact with Rian, he saw Son Yu-jung with her joints twisted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway…
It was commendable that she had tried to save Rian, and the Hand of God grabbed them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go.
As they teleported, a flash pierced through the abyss in an instant.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Whew.
Just below the cloud of fire, Rian examined the massive pit he had created.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It's incredible.
Shirone nodded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. But this is just a part of hell. Purifying Jin Seong Eum will be much more difficult.
Rian gripped the great sword and looked around.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Where's Lete?
She left. We'll meet again soon. She'll be waiting where Jin Seong Eum is.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Marguerite.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It would have been good to raise a glass.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Rest in peace.
Stang National Magic School.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: When you wake up in the morning, make coffee, and go to work, the students are already training intensely.
The teachers greeted Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Good morning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Good morning.
For mages, the Five Great Stars of the Ivory Tower were objects of admiration, though there was a special sense among them.
During the World War, veteran teachers were almost all drafted, so the teachers' ages were roughly similar to Shirone's.

blocks.speaker: Teacher
blocks.content: Thank you so much for helping with the advanced class's supplementary lesson yesterday. You have no idea how much the students were moved.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, it's something I should do.
Although the Ten mages and even Amy guided the students, Shirone was the core.
Amy noticed that the female teachers' gazes were changing day by day.
As Amy watched Shirone chatting, she sighed, and a familiar voice was heard.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: The Five Great Stars is too much.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rampa.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: I don't know much about romance, but it's better to draw a clear line in such cases.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's because he can't say no.
Although she didn't show it, Amy couldn't help but feel a bit relieved by Rampa's words.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: No matter how busy he is, how can he not visit even once at night?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But she couldn't go to him first and lose face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amy. Rampa.
As Shirone said goodbye to the teachers and approached, Amy's reaction was unexpectedly cold.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmph.
As Shirone blinked, Wizard came running from outside the training ground.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Brother!
Seeing her hug Shirone tightly made Amy even more upset, but feeling jealous of a seven-year-old was too pathetic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is today's training?
Shirone, who checked Amy's expression again, smiled and welcomed Wizard.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Today, we will do a special training.
At the word 'special,' Amy turned her head slightly, showing interest.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Have you heard of Force?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Force is.
Shirone raised his index finger and said.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's about colliding existing thoughts with new ones. It's a technique of shifting thoughts.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Hmm.
Wizard nodded, but her voice had a nuance of not fully understanding.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: To explain it simply… Let's say today is exam day, but you had a big fight with your parents in the morning. Because of what happened in the morning, you won't be able to focus on the exam, right?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Hmm.
Shirone gave another example.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Someone you love has died. You're walking in sorrow, and suddenly a carriage comes rushing at you. At that moment, your brain quickly shifts from thinking about your loved one to responding to the carriage.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Aha.
Using that intentionally is Force. In terms of magic, it's like instantly switching batteries.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: It's a very cold technique. It's also cruel because you have to forget your loved one.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha, that's right.
Shirone suddenly became serious.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you can't do it, you'll die.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: …Yes.
The basic is the Cross Force. You keep colliding batteries along the cross-shaped intersection. Like this.
A curtain of light spread above Shirone's head, drawing a cross over 10 meters long.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's faster to see it than to explain. This vision magic will show my Force in real-time.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Force.
Ka-ka-ka-ka-ka-ka!
As Shirone spoke, numerous orbs symbolizing different spells filled the cross.
The orbs bounced off at incredible speed, and effects flashed above the heads of the people around.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Unbelievable.
As the buff magic of the Five Great Stars came in, even the teachers, as well as the students, looked at their bodies.
